iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 13:00 — FALLING STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Kharg Island strikes target military/oil assets, not nuclear infrastructure. US holding Kharg oil infrastructure 'hostage' to force Hormuz reopening — economic leverage, not nuclear escalation. Nuclear track continues de-escalation despite conventional escalation. Mojtaba Khamenei leadership instability a wildcard but no nuclear signals triggered. Trump rejects Putin proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia. 14% (no change).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 14:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) FUJAIRAH OIL TERMINAL STRUCK: Iranian drones hit UAE's Fujairah port — one of world's largest oil storage/bunkering hubs OUTSIDE Hormuz. All oil loading suspended (Bloomberg/Reuters). Iran closing bypass routes around Hormuz blockade. (2) US EMBASSY BAGHDAD HIT FOR 2ND TIME: Missile struck helipad inside compound, smoke rising (AP/Al Jazeera/NYT). (3) New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's first official message: vows to keep Hormuz closed, continue attacking US bases (Guardian). (4) Tehran readies 'more destructive' missiles. (5) 2,500 Marines + assault ships en route. (6) 500+ tankers still trapped, Brent above $100. (7) Kharg Island strikes continue. All bypass routes now under attack — Fujairah, Oman ports. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 13:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) Axios/JPost: Israel planning MASSIVE ground invasion — seize entire area south of Litani River. 'Largest since 2006.' (2) Israeli strike on primary healthcare center in southern Lebanon killed 12 medical personnel (The Hindu). (3) 634+ killed in Lebanon (Guardian), 800K-1M displaced. (4) Hezbollah Radwan forces raiding northern Israel. 210+ rockets since March 2. (5) Israel strikes Beirut, kills Hamas official in south Beirut. (6) Entire families 'wiped out' — Guardian detailed report. (7) Israel agreed to spare Beirut airport but NOT other infrastructure. Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT RISING. Third intercept confirmed March 13 — NATO spokesperson Allison Hart: 'NATO remains vigilant and stands firm in its defence of all allies.' Sirens in Adana near Incirlik. Turkey formally asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting. Politico EU: one more intercept triggers Article 4 consultations. Multiple sources (NYT, Reuters, Bloomberg, Politico, France24) confirmed. 59 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 65. ONE intercept from Article 4 consultations. Zone now IMMINENT (60-100 range).

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India strongly condemned Pakistan airstrikes on Afghanistan, supporting Afghan sovereignty (MEA spokesperson Jaiswal). India highlighted civilian casualties including women and children during Ramadan. No military escalation signals. Qatar mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) TRUMP TEMPORARILY LIFTS RUSSIA OIL SANCTIONS amid Hormuz crisis — Europe furious. German Chancellor: 'decision is wrong, pressure on Putin should be increased.' Major economic lifeline for Russia. (2) Trump rejects Putin's proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia. (3) Russia strikes near Kyiv kill 4, wound 10 (AP/Hindu). (4) Zelenskyy warns ME war drawing anti-aircraft missiles from Ukraine — Russia may exploit. (5) 1,278,430 total casualties, 810 killed/wounded last 24h. (6) Russia expanding drone production to 19,000/day. 30 + 8 (sanctions waiver) + 4 (Iran coupling) = 42.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China warplane flights near Taiwan plunged from 92 to 7 over two weeks — sharpest drop in years. US THAAD fully relocated from South Korea. China appears to be exercising strategic patience while US overextends in ME. US Navy ships redeploying from Nagasaki Japan to Middle East — Indo-Pacific gap widening. $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump approval ahead of Xi summit March 31. No new signals. 12 + 6 (THAAD) - 3 (reduced flights) = 15.

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING — MAJOR ESCALATION. (1) North Korea fired 10+ ballistic missiles in salvo Saturday morning March 14 — coordinated barrage from Sunan area near Pyongyang. Japan confirms ~340km range into Sea of Japan outside EEZ. (2) Timed during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills — direct provocation. (3) Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS calls it 'unprecedented pace.' (4) Launches reject Trump's dialogue outreach. (5) Bloomberg: 'more than 10' missiles — Reuters/Al Jazeera/Nikkei/Japan Times all confirm. Multiple independent confirmations. 8 + 12 (missile test) + 10 (salvo) + 5 (rhetoric) + 6 (China coupling) = 41.

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) Trump temporarily lifts Russia oil sanctions — major economic lifeline, war economy benefits from $100+ oil. Europe condemns move. (2) Zelenskyy: ME war 'bad news for Ukraine' — drawing anti-aircraft missiles away. Warns Russia may exploit to intensify attacks. (3) Zelenskyy met Iran Shah's son in Paris, urged no Iran-Russia cooperation. (4) Russian strikes kill 4 near Kyiv, wound 10 — Brovary hit (AP). (5) Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day, USF to 101,000 by April 1. (6) Polymarket: ceasefire by end March at 2% — effectively dead. (7) 810 Russian casualties last 24h, 1,278,430 total. 35 + 5 (Russia critical) + 5 (Turkey critical) + 5 (sanctions benefit) = 50.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 15 15:00. (1) Pakistan ground forces destroyed 200 check posts, 200 tanks/armored vehicles, holds 32 sq km in Zhob sector (Nation). (2) Afghanistan claims drone hit Pakistan's 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad — Pakistan denies, says drones intercepted (India Today/DW). (3) President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line.' (4) 4 civilian casualties in latest Kabul strikes incl. 2 children (Xinhua). (5) CHINA MEDIATES: FM Wang Yi called both Afghan and Pakistani counterparts urging dialogue over force (Reuters). Soft de-escalation signal but war continues. (6) Indian Express: Pakistan 'caught between Iran war and Afghanistan conflict' — strategic overextension. (7) UNAMA condemned civilian casualties. 10 + 10 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 15 + 2 + 8 - 4 (China mediation) = 77.

top_signals: FUJAIRAH OIL TERMINAL STRUCK — Iranian drones hit UAE's Fujairah port, one of world's largest oil storage hubs OUTSIDE Hormuz. All loading suspended. Iran closing bypass routes around blockade (Bloomberg/Reuters)
US EMBASSY BAGHDAD HIT FOR 2ND TIME — Missile struck helipad inside compound, smoke rising. Escalation of proxy attacks on US diplomatic facilities (AP/Al Jazeera)
US STRIKES KHARG ISLAND — Iran's oil export hub (90% of exports). CENTCOM released strike video. Trump threatens oil infrastructure next (NYT/CNN/AP)
5 KC-135 REFUELING PLANES DAMAGED — Iranian missile strike on Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia. First Iranian strike destroying US aircraft on Gulf state soil (WSJ/Reuters)
NORTH KOREA FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES in salvo during US-South Korea drills — THIRD provocation this week. 'Unprecedented pace' (Reuters/Bloomberg)
NEW IRANIAN SUPREME LEADER vows to keep Hormuz closed, continue US base attacks — first official message from Mojtaba Khamenei (Guardian)
ISRAEL PLANNING MASSIVE GROUND INVASION of southern Lebanon — seize area south of Litani. 'Largest since 2006' (Axios/ToI)
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: PAF strikes 51 locations. Kam Air fuel depot hit in Kandahar. Third week of open war (Reuters/Al Jazeera)

new: pakistan_afghanistan: china_mediation — Chinese FM Wang Yi called both Pakistani and Afghan counterparts urging 'dialogue and consultation, not force.' First major power mediation attempt (Reuters)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: NO DE-ESCALATION. Day 15 15:00 SCAN. Global war probability IMMINENT. SIX trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (77 → slight easing on China mediation signal, still imminent), Turkey (65/71 with coupling). FOUR trackers CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (50/55), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Trump threatens to 'wipe out' Kharg oil infrastructure — point of no return. (b) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 consultations. (c) Israel Lebanon ground invasion timing — 'largest since 2006' planned. (d) DPRK nuclear test risk during 'unprecedented pace' of provocations. (e) US overextension across 5+ active fronts deepening. (f) Zelenskyy warns Russia exploiting ME distraction to intensify Ukraine attacks. (g) China entering Pakistan-Afghanistan mediation — only de-escalation signal across all theaters.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens to 'wipe out' Kharg Island oil infrastructure if Hormuz remains blocked
latest_news.text: President Trump threatened to destroy Kharg Island oil infrastructure if Iran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz. Called on UK, France, China to send warships to the chokepoint. 16+ vessels attacked since war began two weeks ago. Oil prices spiking again.

latest_news.headline: Iranian missile strikes Eilat — child badly injured, Jerusalem also targeted
latest_news.text: An Iranian ballistic missile struck Eilat, injuring a child badly and a man moderately. Jerusalem was also targeted in separate strikes. Continues Iran's direct missile campaign against Israeli territory.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills 12 medics in southern Lebanon strike — second healthcare attack in hours
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit a primary healthcare center in southern Lebanon, killing 12 medical personnel. Second attack on health sector within hours — earlier strike hit paramedic centre in Souaneh killing 2 paramedics. Lebanon's Health Ministry condemned the attacks.

latest_news.headline: North Korea confirms 10 ballistic missiles fired in salvo from Sunan
latest_news.text: South Korea JCS and Japanese MoD confirmed ~10 ballistic missiles launched from Sunan area near Pyongyang at 1:20 PM local time. 340km range into Sea of Japan outside Japan's EEZ. Third provocation during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills this week.

latest_news.headline: Zelenskyy warns ME war drawing anti-aircraft missiles from Ukraine — 'bad news'
latest_news.text: President Zelenskyy warned that the Middle East war is drawing international attention and critical anti-aircraft missiles away from Ukraine. Urged faster implementation of air defense agreements. Met Iran Shah's son in Paris, urged no Iran-Russia cooperation. Russia may exploit the distraction to intensify attacks.

latest_news.headline: China mediates Pakistan-Afghanistan crisis — FM Wang Yi urges dialogue over force
latest_news.text: Chinese FM Wang Yi called both Pakistani and Afghan counterparts urging disputes be 'resolved through dialogue and consultation, not force.' First major power mediation attempt as both sides continue strikes. Pakistan holds 32 sq km in Zhob sector, destroyed 200+ check posts.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan claims it holds 32 sq km in Afghanistan's Zhob sector — ground operations expand
latest_news.text: Pakistan's military claims to hold approximately 32 square km of territory in Afghanistan's Zhob sector. Ground forces destroyed ~200 check posts, 200 tanks and armored vehicles. Air force targeted 51 locations. Both countries now in open war.

latest_news.headline: Trump lifts Russia oil sanctions temporarily — Europe furious, Germany condemns
latest_news.text: Trump temporarily lifted US sanctions on Russian oil exports amid the Hormuz energy crisis. German Chancellor called the decision 'wrong' and insisted pressure on Putin should increase. Major economic lifeline for Russia's war economy at $100+ oil prices.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability IMMINENT (Day 15 15:00). SIX trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (77), Turkey (65, 71 with coupling). FOUR trackers CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (50/55), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). THIS HOUR: (1) Trump threatens to wipe out Kharg oil infrastructure — calls on UK/France/China to send warships to Hormuz. (2) Iranian missile strikes Eilat, child injured. (3) Israel kills 12 medics in southern Lebanon — second healthcare strike in hours. (4) DPRK confirms 10 ballistic missiles from Sunan — third provocation this week. (5) Zelenskyy warns ME war drawing anti-aircraft missiles from Ukraine, Russia may exploit. (6) China enters Pakistan-Afghanistan mediation — only de-escalation signal globally. (7) Pakistan claims 32 sq km in Afghanistan Zhob sector — ground occupation expanding. (8) Trump lifts Russia oil sanctions temporarily — Europe furious. WATCH: Kharg point of no return, 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4, Lebanon ground invasion timing, DPRK nuclear test risk, US overextension across 5+ fronts.
